parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "brand_id":          "{{ $json.brand_id }}",
  "stage":             "{{ $json.stage }}",
  "title":             {{ JSON.stringify($json.title) }},
  "description":       {{ JSON.stringify($json.description) }},
  "target_segment":    {{ JSON.stringify($json.target_segment) }},
  "estimated_reach":   {{ $json.estimated_reach }},
  "suggested_channels": {{ JSON.stringify($json.suggested_channels) }},
  "priority":          "{{ $json.priority }}",
  "reasoning":         {{ JSON.stringify($json.reasoning + (($json.campaign_type) ? ' [type:' + $json.campaign_type + ', offer:' + $json.offer_type + ', schedule:' + JSON.stringify($json.touchpoint_schedule) + ']' : '')) }},
  "status":            "pending_approval"
}
